rules.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_Remaining_Emails
rules.label: Copy 2 of Copy 1 of Remaining Emails

textTemplates.name: ClosedConfirmedWTPEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear all,

The following WTP Reallocation Request has been closed:

Subject : {!$Record.Subject}

Further Details : {!$Record.Further_Details__c}

Strategy : {!$Record.Carmignac_Strategy__r.Product_Name__c}

Share Class : {!$Record.Share_Class__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate from : {!$Record.Country_Out__c} - {!$Record.Company_to_reallocate_from__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate to : {!$Record.Country_In__c} - {!$Record.Company_To_Reallocate_To__r.Name}

Final Amount Reallocated : {!$Record.Final_Amount_Reallocated__c}

Resolution Date : {!$Record.Resolution_Date__c}

Assigned to : {!$Record.Assigned_To__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Assigned_To__r.LastName}

To see full details, click here

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: ClosedRejectedEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear all,

The following WTP Reallocation Request has been closed and rejected:

Subject : {!$Record.Subject}

Further Details : {!$Record.Further_Details__c}

Strategy : {!$Record.Carmignac_Strategy__r.Product_Name__c}

Share Class : {!$Record.Share_Class__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate from : {!$Record.Country_Out__c} - {!$Record.Company_to_reallocate_from__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate to : {!$Record.Country_In__c} - {!$Record.Company_To_Reallocate_To__r.Name}


Reason for rejection : {!$Record.Reason_for_reject__c}




To see full details, click here

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: NewWTPEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear all,

A new WTP Reallocation Request has been created :

Subject : {!$Record.Subject}

Further Details : {!$Record.Further_Details__c}

Strategy: {!$Record.Carmignac_Strategy__r.Product_Name__c}

Share Class : {!$Record.Share_Class__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate from : {!$Record.Country_Out__c} - {!$Record.Company_to_reallocate_from__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate to : {!$Record.Country_In__c} - {!$Record.Company_To_Reallocate_To__r.Name}

{!$Record.Amount_Shares__c} : {!$Record.Amount_or_Number_of_Shares__c}

Date/Range : {!DateRangeOrDate}

To see full details, click here

Kind regards,

Salesforce Support

textTemplates.name: WarningReallocationEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear all,

Please be aware that a reallocation request has been opened for with the following details :

Country/Company to reallocate from : {!$Record.Country_Out__c} - {!$Record.Company_to_reallocate_from__r.Name}

Country/Company to reallocate to : {!$Record.Country_In__c} - {!$Record.Company_To_Reallocate_To__r.Name}

{!$Record.Amount_Shares__c} : {!$Record.Amount_or_Number_of_Shares__c}

See the full record detail here

For any questions or comments on this reallocation request, please get in touch with DCO team, otherwise the request will be executed within the next 5 business days.


Kind regards,

Salesforce Support
